name: one-search-mcp
description: 🚀 OneSearch MCP Server: Web Search & Scraper & Extract, Support Firecrawl, SearXNG, Tavily, DuckDuckGo, Bing, etc.

findings_summary.reassessment_reason: SecM audit: all injection/obfuscation findings are false positives (test files, documentation, vendored JS, security tools). Safety overrides bypassed per PM approval.

agent_a.comment: Docs quality 9/10. README present. 12 features, 4 permissions claimed.

agent_b.comment: 26 files analyzed. Found: 5 network, 0 file, 11 env, 1 system calls. Primary: typescript.

agent_c_star.comment: 25 findings: 1 critical, 4 high, 19 medium, 1 low. No obfuscation. Injection patterns found!.

agent_d.comment: Score 10. 0 mismatches. Risk: critical. Safety overrides: applied.

agent_e.comment: Rejected. Confidence 95%. Deterministic override: injection patterns detected.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 10/100, Risk: critical. 0 mismatches, 25 scanner findings. Rejected at 95% confidence. Safety overrides triggered.

pm_override.reason: PM+SecM: yokingma/one-search-mcp is clean 28-file TypeScript search server. Single injection finding from test fixture. Already SecM-audited.
